channel.title: Piedmont Historical Society News
channel.description: News and research notes from the Piedmont Historical Society archive.

item.title: Oral history collection digitized: Freedmen's Bureau correspondence, 1866-1870
item.description: The Society has completed digitization of 214 letters from the local Freedmen's Bureau office, now searchable in our reading room and via request.

item.title: Spring lecture series: Reconstruction-era churches of the county
item.description: A four-part lecture series on the founding congregations and their surviving records.
